currentChartValues.primary_reason_for_home_health_medical_n: The patient is considered homebound because she is recovering from a recent complex open lower anterior resection with end colostomy, incisional hernia repair, and bilateral myocutaneous flaps. She presents with an open midline abdominal wound, approximately 3cm in length, which requires skilled wound care including packing changes. This medical condition and the associated post-operative recovery severely limit her ability to leave her residence.

currentChartValues.homebound_supporting_factors: Severe pain on ambulation, Exhausting to navigate vehicle and require human assist, Requires assist to manage equipment and public transportation
